name: md-discord-syntax-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Discord syntax extensions (core, remark, obsidian)

scripts.prebuild: npm run build -w @edems-dev/md-discord-syntax-core && npm run build -w @edems-dev/remark-discord-syntax
scripts.start:quartz: npm run build && npm run start -w @jackyzha0/quartz
scripts.dev:quartz: npm run build && npm run dev -w @jackyzha0/quartz
scripts.pretest: node scripts/patch-obsidian.js && npm run build -w @edems-dev/md-discord-syntax-core && npm run build -w @edems-dev/remark-discord-syntax
scripts.test: npm run test -w @edems-dev/md-discord-syntax-core && npm run test -w md-discord-syntax && npm run test -w @edems-dev/md-discord-syntax-quartz && npm run test -w @edems-dev/remark-discord-syntax && node --test scripts/tests/*.test.js
scripts.pretypecheck: npm run build -w @edems-dev/md-discord-syntax-core && npm run build -w @edems-dev/remark-discord-syntax
scripts.release:check: npm run sync:versions && npm run build && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run validate

author: Edems-DEV
